case_title: CULVER, MARGARET vs. SUMMERS, SCOTT et al

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT SUMMERS, SCOTT SUMMERS, LISA

JUDGE CONWAY, JPOND, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK 3:53 PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLTF. MARGARET CULVER PRESENT W/ COUNSEL JOSEPH SCHATZ, DEFTS SCOTT SUMMERS AND LISA SUMMERS PRESENT W/ COUNSEL SCOTT WEAVER. CASE SETTLED, TERMS EXTENSIVELY RECITED ON THE RECORD, SOME OF THE TERMS AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFTS FOR POSS. OF THE UPPER PORTION OF 3820 22ND ST, SF, CA, WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT EXECUTION STAYED UNTIL 11:59 2/28/97. DEFTS WAIVE THE $2,000 SECURITY DEPOSIT. IF DEFTS VACATE THE PREM AS AGREED UPON, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED, EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS. OTHER TERMS STATED ON THE RECORD. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. BOTH PLTF. & DEFTS AGREED AND CONSENTED TO THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CULVER, MARGARET AS TO DEFENDANT SUMMERS, SCOTT SUMMERS, LISA DOES 1 TO 20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CULVER, MARGARET SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-05-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 06 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON DEC-11-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUMMERS, SCOTT SUMMERS, LISA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: UPPER PORTION OF 3820 22ND STREET, SF, CA, STAYED UNTIL FEB-28-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SUMMERS, SCOTT SUMMERS, LISA
